notes: Logical two-leg XTI/XNG betting-against-beta basket from approved card FRAZZINI-BAB-2014_XTI_XNG_S01. Run on XTIUSD.DWX D1 and evaluate the paired package rather than standalone legs. At each broker-month transition, estimate shrunk one-year Dimson betas against an inverse-volatility two-energy benchmark, buy lower beta, sell higher beta, and reject excessive post-rounding beta mismatch. Q02 is a strict two-CFD carrier falsification; no source performance or portfolio admission is claimed.
